headline: Cadence Expands TSMC Alliance to Boost Advanced AI Chip Design
summary: CDNS expands TSMC tie-up to accelerate AI chip design with advanced nodes, silicon-proven IP and AI-driven tools boosting speed, efficiency and adoption.

headline: Shares of companies in the broader software sector are trading lower amid a pullback in sentiment after Q1 financial results and outlook comments from industry peers IBM and ServiceNow.

headline: Cadence Design to Release Q1 Earnings: Here's What to Expect
summary: CDNS heads into Q1 earnings with strong AI-driven demand, solid backlog and rising revenues, but macro and competitive pressures loom.

headline: Cadence And NVIDIA Deepen AI Partnership As Valuation Stays Demanding
summary: Cadence Design Systems (NasdaqGS:CDNS) expanded its partnership with NVIDIA to accelerate agentic AI and digital twin solutions across semiconductor design and physical AI systems. The collaboration focuses on combining Cadence AI-driven design automation and simulation tools with NVIDIA AI infrastructure for use in chip design, physical AI systems, and AI factory digital twins. Cadence Design Systems, a major player in electronic design automation software and IP, sits at the center of how...
